'''Dalls Petothel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an officer within [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] during the first years of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He was the father of [[Gara Petothel]] and husband of [[Edallia Monotheer]]. He worked as an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent for [[Director of Imperial Intelligence]] [[Armand Isard/Legends|Armand Isard]]. Later he was executed together with his wife for giving out information to anti-Imperial faction on [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], though none of them worked for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
